name: dolphinmilkshake
description: > 25 autonomous AI agents organized in a 3-layer pyramid. Captains orchestrate, coordinators dispatch, workers execute. Every action is paid in BSV micropayments and proofed on-chain. The output: verified intelligence reports where every claim is traceable through all 3 layers to its original source. > > **$45 total. 1.5 million transactions. Every one verifiable.**
